summary: ECE student at VIT Vellore specializing in FPGA, Embedded Systems, Verilog HDL, and AI. Dedicated to developing innovative, real-world hardware and software solutions.

experience.detail: Built multiple FPGA, Embedded Systems, and Arduino-based projects while gaining hands-on experience with Verilog HDL, Quartus Prime, ModelSim, Git, and VS Code.

education.detail: Current CGPA: 9.11/10 (through 2nd year). Strong foundation in Digital Electronics, Embedded Systems, FPGA Design, and Software Development. Completed multiple hands-on projects using Verilog HDL, Arduino, Quartus Prime, ModelSim, Git, and VS Code while continuously exploring Artificial Intelligence and modern hardware design.
